　　一种全新的病毒席卷全球，所有人都被感染了，其中部分人会变成毫无理智，以人类为食的怪物！

时泽和室友张嘉茜、安清照在地铁上忽然遭遇变异人袭击，目睹人类变成嗜血的怪物，时泽带着室友和其他幸存者另辟蹊径从地铁隧道离开，而末日也由此拉开序幕。

在求生途中，时泽逐渐意识到自己也被感染，且正在异变，只是异变的方向怎么有点奇怪？

但世界巨变给不了她更多时间深究，她要面临的是天翻地覆的世界和毫无遮掩展示在面前的人性，是生存，还是死亡，这是个值得思考的问题。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oaffac655905f7d934a9b628cb808e357~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"剑未佩妥","author_id":"","book_id":"7431504244328369214","book_name":"末日来临：进化者","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7431504843660853822","read_count":"249","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"307324"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"139","tags":"科幻末世,末世","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oaffac655905f7d934a9b628cb808e357~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779314274&x-signature=dhblqY061nB4WQwZW46VhfTW%2F0U%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"961431464322681","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"76"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220557532BCDF070DFA2C7AB858D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5523,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":207},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1751356112,"author_reply_time":1757420100,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7546115508841530137","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，就是后面有点复杂了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756969156,"group_id":"
